belier.intro: The Virgo Moon deepens today at 20 degrees, now 21 percent illuminated, continuing through your sixth house of routine and practical service. Mercury retrograde persists in your fourth house, still asking for patience with domestic conversations, while Neptune retrograde lingers in your own sign. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your third house, encouraging you to finish what you have been discussing rather than open new topics.
belier.love: The practical care you offered yesterday continues to build trust today. A small routine of consistent kindness matters more than any single gesture.
belier.work: Yesterday's organizing pays off today; you can see more clearly what still needs attention. Continue the detail work rather than starting something new.
belier.energy: Your methodical rhythm continues to serve you well today, with a touch more ease than yesterday's first adjustment.
belier.intuition: The distinction between confidence and certainty that emerged yesterday continues to clarify. Trust the steadier read you now have on the situation.
belier.mantra: I let steady care build something lasting.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your fifth house today at 20 degrees, extending yesterday's lighter, more creative mood. Mercury retrograde remains in your third house, still asking for careful communication about home matters. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your second house, keeping material security present but slightly less urgent than earlier in the week.
taureau.love: The playful energy from yesterday deepens today into something a little more meaningful. Let shared joy continue to nourish the relationship without forcing it toward seriousness.
taureau.work: The creative project revisited yesterday deserves a final round of refinement today. Trust that the details you are polishing now will matter later.
taureau.energy: Your balance between steadiness and lightness continues today, a comfortable rhythm worth savoring rather than rushing past.
taureau.intuition: What delighted you yesterday continues to point toward something worth pursuing further. Notice if the same pull returns today.
taureau.mantra: I let joy continue to guide my steady path.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Virgo Moon deepens in your fourth house today, continuing to turn attention toward home and inner foundations. Mercury remains retrograde in your own sign, so reflections about your roots may still surface tangled memories, though with less confusion than yesterday. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your first house, keeping personal needs close to the surface for one more day.
gemeaux.love: The conversation about home or family history that began yesterday can move further today. Old feelings continue to clarify rather than complicate.
gemeaux.work: Domestic administrative tasks continue to move smoothly today. Finish what you organized yesterday before Mercury's retrograde asks for anything new.
gemeaux.energy: Your mental focus remains turned inward today, a good final day for organizing your own space and thoughts before outward engagement resumes.
gemeaux.intuition: The feeling about your living situation from yesterday deserves one more honest look today. A fuller pattern may now be visible.
gemeaux.mantra: I let my inner home settle into clarity.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun nears 26 degrees in your own sign as the Virgo Moon continues through your third house of communication today. Mercury retrograde remains in your twelfth house, still surfacing memory, though with growing clarity. Neptune retrograde in Aries keeps your tenth house of career gently unclear, but the fog continues visibly thinning.
cancer.love: The clear conversation from yesterday deserves a gentle follow-up today. Confirm what was understood rather than assuming.
cancer.work: Correspondence and small logistics continue to move smoothly today. This remains a good day for tying up loose ends rather than starting major new projects.
cancer.energy: Your emotional steadiness continues, supported by the Sun nearing the peak of its time in your sign. Use this reserve to finish rather than begin.
cancer.intuition: The specific detail that surfaced yesterday continues to make more sense today. Trust the growing precision of your own understanding.
cancer.mantra: I let clarity settle fully into place.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your second house of resources today, extending yesterday's practical, grounding mood. Mercury retrograde remains in your twelfth house, still favoring private processing over public announcement. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your twelfth house, adding a final layer of emotional depth to this reflective personal season.
lion.love: The practical gesture of reliability from yesterday continues to strengthen a bond today. Consistency, more than any single act, is what is being noticed.
lion.work: Financial review continues to serve you well today. Ground your personal intention a little further in something measurable before moving forward.
lion.energy: Your vitality remains practically focused today, well suited to finishing a tangible task begun yesterday.
lion.intuition: The quiet sense about your own worth that emerged yesterday deserves continued attention today. Notice where confidence and self-worth are beginning to align.
lion.mantra: I let my worth settle into steady confidence.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon continues through your own sign today at 20 degrees, extending yesterday's welcome clarity. Mercury, your ruler, remains retrograde in your eleventh house, still complicating group plans, though with somewhat less confusion than before. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your eleventh house, keeping friendship warm for one more day.
vierge.love: Your own needs, named clearly yesterday, deserve to be reinforced today rather than softened. Consistency in honesty builds real trust.
vierge.work: The group project reassessed yesterday can be revisited again today with continued clear eyes. A decision may be closer than it feels.
vierge.energy: Your energy remains sharp and steady with the Moon still at home in your sign. Use this extended clarity while it lasts.
vierge.intuition: Your instincts about yourself continue to prove reliable today. Trust what has held true across these two days.
vierge.mantra: I continue to trust what I know about myself.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your twelfth house today, extending yesterday's inward pull after a stretch of social and professional focus. Mercury retrograde remains in your tenth house, still asking you to revisit rather than initiate career conversations. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your tenth house, keeping your public path emotionally significant for one more day.
balance.love: The quiet, private moment from yesterday continues to deepen today. Let intimacy remain the priority over performance for a little longer.
balance.work: Behind-the-scenes preparation continues to matter more than visible action today. Use this final quiet day before outward energy naturally returns.
balance.energy: Your energy remains turned inward today. Continue to honor the need for rest rather than pushing toward premature engagement.
balance.intuition: The message from yesterday's quiet reflection continues to develop. A clearer sense of your next public step may be forming.
balance.mantra: I let my next step form in quiet certainty.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your eleventh house of friendship today, extending yesterday's welcome shift toward community. Mercury retrograde remains in your ninth house, still asking for a second look before finalizing travel, publishing, or educational plans. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your ninth house, keeping meaning and purpose emotionally alive for one more day.
scorpion.love: The friend's perspective offered yesterday continues to inform your view of a relationship today. Let it settle rather than rushing to act on it.
scorpion.work: Community support for a long-term goal continues to be available today. Stay open to practical help that arrives from an unexpected direction.
scorpion.energy: Your ambition continues to find good company today rather than solitary focus. Let shared momentum keep carrying part of the load.
scorpion.intuition: The clarity about which goals genuinely align with your values continues to sharpen today. Notice what has become obvious that was unclear before.
scorpion.mantra: I let genuine values guide my larger ambitions.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your tenth house of career today, extending yesterday's grounded, practical energy. Mercury retrograde remains in your eighth house, still asking for care with shared resources or emotionally weighted conversations. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your eighth house, keeping the emotional undertone of intimate matters present for one more day.
sagittaire.love: Consistent reliability continues to matter more than grand gestures today. The steady presence you offered yesterday is being noticed and valued.
sagittaire.work: Career matters continue to benefit from detail-oriented attention today. Finish refining your public image rather than starting something entirely new.
sagittaire.energy: Your ambition remains focused and practical today, a good day to complete rather than to explore further.
sagittaire.intuition: The practical detail about your reputation noticed yesterday deserves final attention today. Address it before moving on to new pursuits.
sagittaire.mantra: I finish what careful, honest work has begun.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your ninth house of belief today, extending yesterday's grounded expansion. Mercury retrograde remains in your seventh house, still favoring review over new agreements in partnership. The Cancer Sun nears the end of your seventh house, keeping a significant relationship emotionally central for one more day.
capricorne.love: The conversation about shared values from yesterday continues to develop today. Practical alignment matters as much as emotional connection right now.
capricorne.work: Educational or long-distance matters continue to move forward smoothly today. Ground any remaining big idea in a concrete next step.
capricorne.energy: Your steady discipline continues to find a natural outlet in pursuits combining meaning with structure today.
capricorne.intuition: The gap between belief and lived experience noticed yesterday deserves one more honest look today. Trust what practical testing has revealed.
capricorne.mantra: I trust what lived experience has taught me.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your eighth house of intimacy today, extending yesterday's call for deeper honesty. Pluto retrograde continues its slow transformation within your own sign. Mercury retrograde remains in your sixth house, still asking for patience with daily routines and health matters, while the Cancer Sun nears the end of your sixth house.
verseau.love: The vulnerable conversation from yesterday continues to open real closeness today. Let honesty about shared resources keep deepening rather than retreat.
verseau.work: The financial or resource-sharing matter reviewed yesterday deserves one more precise look today. Details continue to clarify what feeling alone could not.
verseau.energy: Your body continues to benefit from careful attention to habits affecting deeper wellbeing today, building on yesterday's insight.
verseau.intuition: Pluto's ongoing work continues, and today's practical insight about a shared bond builds directly on yesterday's discovery.
verseau.mantra: I let honesty keep deepening this closeness.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Virgo Moon continues through your seventh house of partnership today, extending yesterday's grounding mirror to your own fluid nature. Neptune, your ruler, remains retrograde in Aries within your second house, still clarifying your relationship with worth and security. Mercury retrograde in your fifth house continues to ask for patience with creative or romantic plans.
poissons.love: The partner's practical perspective from yesterday continues to prove valuable today. Structure and intuition continue working well together.
poissons.work: Collaborative work continues to benefit from clear agreements today. Follow through on what you put in writing yesterday.
poissons.energy: The balance between your usual flow and yesterday's grounding influence continues today. Use it to solidify a concrete next step.
poissons.intuition: Neptune's clarifying work continues, and today's insight builds on yesterday's translation of feeling into something actionable.
poissons.mantra: I let clarity and intuition move forward together.
poissons.author: Sibylle
